title: Quotations
metaTitle: Free Quotation & Estimate Software · Win More Deals · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Send professional quotations and estimates in any currency, free forever. Track opens, convert to invoice in one click, e-sign approvals. Works worldwide.
keywords: quotation software, free quotation, estimate maker, sales quote, proposal, convert quote to invoice, e-sign quote
heroSubtitle: Build a clean, branded quotation in minutes, send it for approval, and turn the accepted ones into invoices with a single click. Any currency, any language.

features.title: Professional quotes
features.desc: Branded, itemised quotations with your logo, terms and validity dates.

features.title: Online approval
features.desc: Clients accept and e-sign from a secure link, no printing or scanning.

features.title: Quote to invoice
features.desc: Convert an accepted quote into an invoice in one click, totals carried over.

features.title: Pipeline visibility
features.desc: See which quotes are sent, viewed, accepted or expired at a glance.

features.title: Any currency & tax
features.desc: Quote in any currency with the right tax rate baked into the totals.

features.title: Reusable templates
features.desc: Save your common line items and terms so the next quote takes seconds.

sections.title: Make it effortless for clients to approve
sections.body: A quotation that is easy to read and easy to accept wins more often. Paper & Pen sends a tidy PDF and a secure link where your client can review, accept and even e-sign on their phone. You get notified the moment they do.

sections.title: From quote to cash without retyping
sections.body: When a quote is accepted, convert it straight into an invoice or a sales order. Line items, discounts, currency and tax all carry across, so nothing is lost and nothing is mistyped. The deal flows cleanly into your accounting.
items: Audit trail from quote to payment

faqs.a: Yes. Creating and sending quotations is part of the free-forever Sales & Invoicing module, with no limit on quotes or clients.

faqs.q: Can clients accept a quote online?
faqs.a: Yes. Send a secure link where the client can review, accept and e-sign from any device. You're notified instantly.

faqs.q: How do I turn a quote into an invoice?
faqs.a: Open the accepted quote and click convert. The invoice is created with all line items, currency and tax carried over.

faqs.q: Can I quote in different currencies?
faqs.a: Yes. Quote in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR or any currency, with the correct decimals and tax applied.
Yes. Save frequent items, terms and notes as templates so repeat quotes take seconds.

ctaSub: Start free and build your first quotation in minutes. Convert it to an invoice the moment it's accepted.
